lines.text: Your trade just failed gate seven. Want to see all fifteen?
AlgoSphere checks fifteen institutional risk gates before any order touches your broker.
Daily loss cap. Weekly loss cap. Max consecutive losses. Max size increase. Drawdown ceiling.
Correlation cap. Spread guard. Session window. News window block. Regime stress.
Kill switch. Account tier. Broker connection live. Position cap per symbol. Total exposure cap.
All fifteen must pass. One fails. No trade.
Institutional risk. Retail simplicity. Free trial. Link in bio.
